2.1 Channel Dolby Audio System

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text el_class=”mobile-dark-txt”]

Elevate your entertainment with rich, room-filling audio. This 2.1 soundbar combines Dolby Digital decoding with a dedicated wireless subwoofer to deliver clear dialogue and impressive bass depth-perfect for movies, music, and gaming.

Compact Soundbar – Big Sound, Small Footprint

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text el_class=”mobile-dark-txt”]

Perfect audio clarity in an ultra-slim design. This all-in-one soundbar proves you don’t need a subwoofer to enjoy superior sound. Ideal for smaller spaces, bedrooms, or secondary rooms where simplicity meets performance.

TowerSpeaker 240W Sub Woofer

Digital FM Radio
2*6.5 Inch Sub
Bluetooth
